channel.title: Overview on Hugo KiCad Site — Demo
channel.description: Recent content in Overview on Hugo KiCad Site — Demo

item.title: Release
item.description:
This page demonstrates the release layout type. In a real project with tagged releases, it shows:

  • A link to the GitHub release
  • Download links for Gerbers, BOM, schematics (PDF)
  • Visual diffs of schematic/PCB changes against the previous release

All assets are discovered automatically by the CI workflow.

item.title: Board
item.description:
About this example

This page demonstrates the board layout type, which combines:

  1. An interactive KiCanvas schematic/PCB viewer (above)
  2. A 3D render gallery (when renders are available)
  3. An interactive BOM viewer (when iBOM is available)
  4. Custom markdown content (this section)

The KiCad files shown here are from the Arduino Uno Shield template included with KiCad.

In a real project, 3D renders and the interactive BOM are generated automatically by KiBot during CI.
